buttons.primary: bg-[#1A4D2E] text-white hover:bg-[#143D24] rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F0FDF4] text-[#1A4D2E] hover:bg-[#DCFCE7] rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium border border-[#1A4D2E]/10
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#1A4D2E] text-[#1A4D2E] hover:bg-[#1A4D2E] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium

cards.feature: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl border border-border/50 hover:border-[#1A4D2E]/30 transition-colors group
cards.pricing: bg-slate-50 p-10 rounded-3xl border border-border relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#1A4D2E] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

layout_strategies.hero: Split screen layout. Left side: Typography heavy, value prop. Right side: High-quality image or collage. Use 'min-h-[90vh]' for impact.
layout_strategies.bento_grid: Use CSS Grid 'grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6'. Spans: Hero item 'col-span-2 row-span-2', Tall item 'row-span-2'.
layout_strategies.sidebar_layout: Flex container. Sidebar: 'w-full md:w-64 shrink-0 sticky top-24 h-fit'. Main content: 'flex-1'.
layout_strategies.asymmetry: Offset elements using 'mt-12' or 'translate-y-12' on alternate columns to break the grid.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap");' to index.css immediately.
2. UPDATE TAILWIND: Extend the theme in tailwind.config.js with the colors provided in 'design_system.colors.palette'. Map 'primary' to '#1A4D2E'.
3. LOGO: Create a text-based logo component using 'Playfair Display' font, bold weight, text-3xl. It should say 'Sell4You'.
4. NAVIGATION: Create a clean, sticky navbar with links: Home, About, Market Facts, Contact. Use 'backdrop-blur-md' for the glass effect.

5. HERO SECTION: Use the 'hero_background' image. Overlay it with a gradient or use a split layout. Headline: 'Turn Your Unwanted Items into Cash'. Subhead: 'Professional selling service by Conor Blackburn. 25% Commission. No Hassle.'
6. ABOUT PAGE: Highlight 'Conor Blackburn', 'Dublin based', 'Shankill Tennis Club (2.5 years admin)', '100% Positive Feedback on Adverts.ie (73 reviews)'. Use the 'trust_indicator' image here.
7. MARKET FACTS: Create a page with a Sidebar Menu for navigation (e.g., 'Market Trends', 'Best Sellers', 'Pricing Guide'). Use the 'bento_grid' layout for the content.
8. PRICING GUIDE: Create a section listing expected prices for Tech, Clothes, Antiques. Use the category images provided.
9. CONTACT FORM: Simple form (Name, Email, Item Description, Upload Image). Use Shadcn Form components.
10. FOOTER: Minimalist. Copyright Conor Blackburn. Links to social/email.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. No centered text blocks without purpose.
Use generous padding (py-24, px-8) to create a premium feel.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use '#1A4D2E' for primary text on light backgrounds.
Do not use gradients for text unless it's a very subtle shimmer.
Images must have 'object-cover' and rounded corners where appropriate.
